flowchart TD subgraph SourceSystems GH[GitHub] ADO[Azure DevOps] CONF[Confluence] SP[SharePoint] end
subgraph rMEMbrPlatform COSMOS[Cosmos DB - vectors + pointers] BLOB[Blob Storage - cache/artifacts] REDIS[Redis - semantic cache] end
SourceSystems --> COSMOS COSMOS --> SourceSystems SourceSystems --> BLOB COSMOS --> REDIS
